title: Fabric Key Binding API for 1.14.2
description: Ports the fabric-key-binding-api-v1 to 1.14.2 as it is missing in that version of the Fabric API.
body:
# Fabric Key Binding API v1

## About

This mod is a port of the fabric-key-binding-api-v1 component of the fabric api to minecraft version 1.14.2 as it is not included in the normal fabric api.

![Mod Menu Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c1a12ebcfcdf46efec5e9dcb6214a4da3a0608.png)

## Why

When trying to port a zoom mod to 1.14.2 I ran into the issue of not having this libary so instead of trying to use the v0 library it was just easier to port this.
